channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ BTC USD PRICE FALLS BELOW $67K: 10-YEAR US TREASURY YIELD APPROACHES YEARLY HIGH ☠⚡
item.description:
**Title: BTC Meltdown: The Beast Drops Below $67K as Treasury Yields Rocket! 🤘🔥**
Hold onto your helmets, crypto warriors! The legendary Bitcoin, that electrifying beast of the digital realm, just took a nosedive! For the first time since the dark times of March 9, BTC USD has crashed below the sacred $67,000 threshold, plummeting like a fallen angel on a mission—down a savage 5% in just 24 hours to settle at a gnarly $66,300! 🎸💀
The chaotic rollercoaster ride of crypto doesn't stop there, folks! The 10-year US Treasury yield is revving up, creeping ever closer to yearly highs like a relentless juggernaut. This volatile market is a twisted game, and the stakes are higher than a heavy metal guitar solo!
So gear up, you fearless hodlers and crypto death metal fans! We’re entrenched in the battlefield of money and mayhem, where every tick of the price chart echoes like a thunderous drumbeat. Are you ready to plunge into this chaos and make some noise? 🤟💰
Don’t let the market’s dark vibes shake your resolve! Embrace the turmoil, ride the waves, and let’s thrash through this together! Check the full chaos report—yeah, it’s all going down at [Cryptonews](https://cryptonews.com/news/btc-usd-price-below-67k-treasury-yield/)! ⚡️🖤
#XRP #Bullmarket #SOL #Altcoins #Crypto
item.content:encoded:
**Title: BTC Meltdown: The Beast Drops Below $67K as Treasury Yields Rocket! 🤘🔥**
Hold onto your helmets, crypto warriors! The legendary Bitcoin, that electrifying beast of the digital realm, just took a nosedive! For the first time since the dark times of March 9, BTC USD has crashed below the sacred $67,000 threshold, plummeting like a fallen angel on a mission—down a savage 5% in just 24 hours to settle at a gnarly $66,300! 🎸💀
The chaotic rollercoaster ride of crypto doesn't stop there, folks! The 10-year US Treasury yield is revving up, creeping ever closer to yearly highs like a relentless juggernaut. This volatile market is a twisted game, and the stakes are higher than a heavy metal guitar solo!
So gear up, you fearless hodlers and crypto death metal fans! We’re entrenched in the battlefield of money and mayhem, where every tick of the price chart echoes like a thunderous drumbeat. Are you ready to plunge into this chaos and make some noise? 🤟💰
Don’t let the market’s dark vibes shake your resolve! Embrace the turmoil, ride the waves, and let’s thrash through this together! Check the full chaos report—yeah, it’s all going down at [Cryptonews](https://cryptonews.com/news/btc-usd-price-below-67k-treasury-yield/)! ⚡️🖤
#XRP #Bullmarket #SOL #Altcoins #Crypto
